title: BreadcrumbField components listed in docs don't exist in codebase
body: docs/admin-components/README.md references ChapterBreadcrumbField and LessonBreadcrumbField at src/ui/admin/ChapterBreadcrumbField/ and src/ui/admin/LessonBreadcrumbField/, but these directories do not exist in the codebase. Either implement them or remove the documentation entries.
rationale: Documentation references components that don't exist — either the docs are stale or the components were planned but never built.
